ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square miles */,
  "mayor_name" TEXT /* Name of the mayor */,
  "city_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each city */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code where the city is located */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* County code where the city is located */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the city was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the city */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for city administration */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for city administration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "combined_tax" REAL /* Combined tax rate */,
  "state_rate" REAL /* State tax rate */,
  "county_tax" REAL /* County tax rate */,
  "city_tax" REAL /* City tax rate */,
  "special_tax" REAL /* Special tax rate */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date from which the tax rate is effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date until which the tax rate is valid */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tax rate */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the tax rate record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax rate record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the tax rate record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax rate record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rates_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax collection record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date of the tax collection */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of tax collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tax collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tax collection */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the tax collection record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax collection record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the tax collection record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the tax collection record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_collections_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the report */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_reports_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., auditor, city staff, admin) */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the auditor */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the audit (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the audit activity */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the audit log */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit log was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the audit log */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public dashboard */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was last updated */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the data file for the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the dashboard */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the dashboard */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_dashboards_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the external system (e.g., POS, e-commerce platform) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "connection_date" TEXT /* Date when the integration was established */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the integration */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the integration record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the integration record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the integration record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the integration record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
